prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FOLDINGSLUICEBOXBACKPACK-D-KHAKI Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 24pc Deluxe 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit, Desert Khaki Description: The ASR Outdoor 24 Piece Deluxe Gold Panning Kit with Sluice Box was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50 inch run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a 5 gallon bucket as well as the included 30L canvas backpack making this ideal for beginner gold panning, day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding gold sluice box into remote areas anywhere!

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining operations with this sluice box backpack gold panning kit.

With our top load canvas backpack you'll be able to carry as much equipment as you need. This 30L hiking day pack has room, even while filled with the sluice box to contain all your outdoor gear; featuring quick release buckles and a draw string closure to keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily accessible in the large central pouch. The two side pouches close securely by zipper and hook-and-loop canvas flap.

The included gold mining equipment is ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is position correctly in the field. When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning.

Best in quality components are included in this complete backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. The gold panning equipment includes a 1/2 classifier screen, multiple gold pans and an assortment of gold recovery collection tools for all experience levels of gold prospecting enthusiasts. Search Terms: complete adult gold panning kit classifier screen set prospecting equipment mining tools folding sluice box kids gold pan hiking adventure mineral collection paydirt gifts for dad Features: - BACKPACK GOLD PANNING KIT WITH SLUICE BOX: 24 total pieces; everything you need to strike it rich in one complete sluice box gold panning kit; process your gold rich paydirt anywhere you can get on the gold - EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. No assembly required. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Best in quality components included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. For all experience levels of gold panning enthusiasts - GOLD SLUICE BOX: Highly durable, constructed from rust-free aluminum. Includes miners moss and gold carpet pre installed. Extended Dimensions: 50" Length; 9.25" Channel; 2.5" Side Wall; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 7" (LxWxH); 13.25" Flange - GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: 50" Gold Sluice Box, Backpack, 1/2" sifting classifier screen, 10" and 12" dual riffle gold pans, 10” finishing gold pan, Magnifying tweezers, (2) Carabiner clips, Folding pick axe shovel, Marking ribbon (assorted colors), (4) Assorted bedrock crevice tool picks; Fine gold recovery tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
